race.comment: FIRE AND LIGHT (1) did a great job to score by a nose over this course and distance last start in a far better run. Winning hoop Lowe sticks and again gets the benefit of her claim. Finds another suitable race and can go back-to-back without surprising. MICHIFUKU (2) finished 11th two runs back then did well last start but found one better over 1890m at this track, beaten only a nose after being prominent at the turn. Finds a suitable race and can find the winner's circle. HEAVENLY LOVE (5) is racing well including a last start second over 2150m at Ipswich. Expected to be in the finish. The well-related RUGBY (3) (half to G3 winner and 3xG2 placed Mallory) performed above expectations last time over 1625m at this circuit, getting the prize by 1.75 lengths. In the mix again.
